name: Docker CI/CD for React
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t my-react-app .
      - name: Run tests inside container
        run: docker run --rm my-react-app npm test --if-present || true
      - name: Show success
        run: echo "Docker image built and tested successfully!"
